task: Flagship expert task: Lipid-Nanoparticle Encapsulation and Particle-Size Release Review. Reality context: an mRNA LNP pilot lot shows borderline encapsulation and high polydispersity before fill-finish scheduling. Embedded packet: batches: B1 encapsulation_pct=94.2 size_nm=82 PDI=0.18 residual_ethanol_pct=0.22, B2 encapsulation=88.6 size=105 PDI=0.31 ethanol=0.18, B3 encapsulation=91.1 size=97 PDI=0.24 ethanol=0.36; specs encapsulation>=90, size 70-100, PDI<=0.25, ethanol<=0.30; actions diafiltration reduces_ethanol=0.12 increases_PDI=0.02, reprocess_mix improves_encap=3.0 size_minus=7 PDI_minus=0.04 cost=68000. Rules and constraints: Classify each batch, simulate actions, and recommend release/reprocess/reject with metric-level rationale. Required work: deliver lnp_release_review.xlsx + process_disposition.md. The deliverables must include formulas or executable logic, intermediate calculations, row-level citations to the embedded packet, validation checks, uncertainty notes, sensitivity checks around the controlling thresholds, and a final decision table with pass/warn/fail/needs_review labels. Use only the embedded packet. Do not import external data, invent missing values, or hide unresolved assumptions.
